name: v05-jwt-protected
description: v0.5 production-grade middleware demo — guarded by `jwt-auth` which verifies a JWT via @blokjs/jwt-verify (HS256 against JWT_SECRET in dev / RS256 against JWT_JWKS_URI in prod), validates iss + aud + exp, and stashes the decoded claims at ctx.state.identity. Demonstrates v0.5.2 workflow-level middleware: the chain is declared once at the top of the workflow (`middleware: [...]` field, sibling to `trigger`) instead of being repeated inside the trigger config. Useful when a workflow has multiple triggers (HTTP + worker) that should all share the same auth chain. Set JWT_SECRET=<shared-secret> and JWT_AUDIENCE=<expected-aud> in your env to exercise the HS256 path; the smoke gate sets these for you.

inputs.expression: ({ ok: true, identity: { sub: ctx.state.identity.sub, iss: ctx.state.identity.iss, aud: ctx.state.identity.aud, exp: ctx.state.identity.exp }, customClaims: Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(ctx.state.identity.claims).filter(([k]) => !['iss','aud','exp','iat','sub','nbf'].includes(k))) })
